description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a robust, rounded carapace that is dark brown with orange and lighter mottled markings. Its two large claws (chelae) are prominently raised, with the tips showing a lighter, almost white coloration. The crab's legs are segmented and splayed outward, displaying a mix of brown, orange, and cream hues, with visible joints and spines. The underside is paler, with a creamy white to light tan coloration and visible segmentation. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, giving the crab a vigilant appearance. The overall texture appears hard and slightly rough, typical of a crab's exoskeleton.
description: A lifelike crab with a dark, mottled carapace, large raised claws, and segmented orange-brown legs. The surface is hard and textured, with eyes on short stalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, dark carapace, both large claws raised, and the full spread of segmented legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the crab's body depth, the curvature of the carapace, and the profile of the claws and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pale, segmented underside and the arrangement of the legs and claws from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the crab's body depth and the articulation of the legs and claws.
